title: Verify T11: Flag feedback injection
description: Run and verify the --feedback flag test case T11. Execute `@kody --feedback "Use functional style"` and confirm that: (1) feedback text appears in build stage logs as `feedback: Use functional style`, (2) FEEDBACK env var is properly propagated through the orchestrate job, and (3) the pipeline completes successfully.
existing_patterns: .github/workflows/kody.yml lines 65, 207, 263 - FEEDBACK env var parsing and propagation through pipeline
